creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ume         2010-04-04 16:22:51 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics/xface.el    distinfo 
  Log:
  Fix size and checksum of x-face-e21.el.gz.
  x-face-e21.el is for Emacs 21 and later.  However, graphics/xface.el
  doesn't care recent Emacsen, but mail/x-face-e21.el does.
  The conflict between graphics/xface.el and graphics/xface.el should
  be fixed in the future.
  
  Reported by:    Alexey Shuvaev <shuvaev__at__physik.uni-wuerzburg.de>
  PR:             ports/141839
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.19      +3 -3      ports/graphics/xface.el/distinfo
